title: indigofera astragalina
intro: Indigofera astragalina, also known as Huang Qi or Astragalus, is a perennial plant native to China and Mongolia, belonging to the legume family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Indigofera astragalina is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help to boost the immune system and increase resistance to stress, disease, and environmental factors. Its medicinal properties include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immunomodulatory effects, contributing to various health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, enhanced immune function, and reduced oxidative stress. Indigofera astragalina can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
